title: Home
meta_description: bbau.ac.in, Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University was established in Lucknow in 1996 as Central University (By an Act of Parliament 1994) with the objects of promoting advance knowledge by instructional and research facilities in science, key and frontier areas of technology and other allied disciplines.
meta_keywords: bbau.ac.in, Central University, Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar, Ambedkar Studies, Reservation, Schedule Cast, Schedule Tribes, SC/ST, PhD, Mphil, M.Sc, MCA, Information Technology, M.Tech, Law, Management, B.Tech, Bio-Technologies, Environmental Sciences
